text.value:
DECLARE @run_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = NEWID();

INSERT INTO dbo.pipeline_run_log (
    log_id,
    run_id,
    pipeline_name,
    pipeline_step,
    layer_name,
    status,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    duration_seconds,
    rows_inserted,
    error_message,
    run_date
)
VALUES (
    NEWID(),
    @run_id,
    'PL_Gold_Gameplay_Analytics',
    'fact_game_session',
    'Gold',
    'STARTED',
    SYSDATETIME(),
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    CAST(SYSDATETIME() AS DATE)
);

DECLARE @start_time DATETIME2(6);
DECLARE @run_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER;

SELECT TOP 1
    @start_time = start_time,
    @run_id = run_id
FROM dbo.pipeline_run_log
WHERE pipeline_name = 'PL_Gold_Gameplay_Analytics'
  AND pipeline_step = 'fact_game_session'
  AND status = 'STARTED'
ORDER BY start_time DESC;

INSERT INTO dbo.pipeline_run_log (
    log_id,
    run_id,
    pipeline_name,
    pipeline_step,
    layer_name,
    status,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    duration_seconds,
    rows_inserted,
    error_message,
    run_date
)
SELECT
    NEWID(),
    @run_id,
    'PL_Gold_Gameplay_Analytics',
    'fact_game_session',
    'Gold',
    'SUCCESS',
    @start_time,
    SYSDATETIME(),
    DATEDIFF(SECOND, @start_time, SYSDATETIME()),
    COUNT(*),
    NULL,
    CAST(SYSDATETIME() AS DATE)
FROM dbo.fact_game_session;

DECLARE @start_time DATETIME2(6);
DECLARE @run_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER;

SELECT TOP 1
    @start_time = start_time,
    @run_id = run_id
FROM dbo.pipeline_run_log
WHERE pipeline_name = 'PL_Gold_Gameplay_Analytics'
  AND pipeline_step = 'fact_game_session'
  AND status = 'STARTED'
ORDER BY start_time DESC;

INSERT INTO dbo.pipeline_run_log (
    log_id,
    run_id,
    pipeline_name,
    pipeline_step,
    layer_name,
    status,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    duration_seconds,
    rows_inserted,
    error_message,
    run_date
)
VALUES (
    NEWID(),
    @run_id,
    'PL_Gold_Gameplay_Analytics',
    'fact_game_session',
    'Gold',
    'FAILED',
    @start_time,
    SYSDATETIME(),
    DATEDIFF(SECOND, @start_time, SYSDATETIME()),
    0,
    'Pipeline failed during fact_game_session build',
    CAST(SYSDATETIME() AS DATE)
);
